title: BOH Morning Duty
items: Ensure everything is fully stocked and ready:
Chilli & spring onion (keep in fridge, take out when needed)
Grill → clean, preheated to correct temp
Stove → clean, pots and pans ready
Fryer → on and at correct temperature ( 150°C & 170°C)
Ensure all equipment is ready and functioning
Listen carefully to the pass person
Notify pass person when items are ready to send. ONLY PASS PERSON IS ALOWWED TO SEND FOOD
Quickly restock missing/ running out items
Prepare dip sauces ( For poke powl , Maple syrupt )
Fire up grill immediately when a new order comes in
Start cooking as soon as the pass calls the order
Once hot, add ingredients and season with salt
Prepare egg mix last or when notified by pass person
Keep station clean and tidy at all times
Ensure everything is topped up and properly set up
Check in with grill person and communicate needs
Turn on toaster and prepare all toasts and buns
Prepare plates and dress them up
Drop fryer items and set timer
Turn on heat lamp when food is plated
Check toaster and prepare breads & buns
Send food out in order sequence
Keep dockets for any incomplete orders
